news.title:
Signature Global secures ₹1,293 cr investment from RMZ for a 50% stake in GCL.
The deal follows last month's SSPA signing, finalizing on Monday.
news.summary:
Signature Global secures ₹1,293 cr investment from RMZ for a 50% stake in GCL.
The deal follows last month's SSPA signing, finalizing on Monday.

news.title:
Signature Global partners with RMZ to cut 50% stake in subsidiary GCL.
Deal aims for commercial growth, securing ₹1,293 crore investment.
news.summary:
Signature Global partners with RMZ to cut 50% stake in subsidiary GCL.
Deal aims for commercial growth, securing ₹1,293 crore investment.

news.title:
Signatureglobal approved Rs 50 cr acquisition of a residential project from GCL.
Board approved transfer of 3.57 cr GCL shares to RMZ for Rs 56.7 cr.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal approved Rs 50 cr acquisition of a residential project from GCL.
Board approved transfer of 3.57 cr GCL shares to RMZ for Rs 56.7 cr.

news.title:
Signatureglobal extends sale disposal completion date to 31 Mar 2026.
Extension is mutual, linked to SSPA, per SEBI Listing Regulations.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal extends sale disposal completion date to 31 Mar 2026.
Extension is mutual, linked to SSPA, per SEBI Listing Regulations.

news.title:
SignatureGlobal India updates sale completion date under SEBI norms to 31st March 2026.
This extends the initial Long Stop Date of 23rd March 2026 as per SSPA agreement.
news.summary:
SignatureGlobal India updates sale completion date under SEBI norms to 31st March 2026.
This extends the initial Long Stop Date of 23rd March 2026 as per SSPA agreement.

news.title:
Signature Global plans a luxury housing project on SPR, Gurugram.
The project targets an estimated revenue of ₹5,000 crore, says Chairman Pradeep Aggarwal.
news.summary:
Signature Global plans a luxury housing project on SPR, Gurugram.
The project targets an estimated revenue of ₹5,000 crore, says Chairman Pradeep Aggarwal.

news.title:
Signatureglobal forms 50:50 JV with Millennia Realtors for a mixed-use project.
The Gurugram project has a transaction value of up to ₹1,283 crore.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal forms 50:50 JV with Millennia Realtors for a mixed-use project.
The Gurugram project has a transaction value of up to ₹1,283 crore.

news.title:
Signatureglobal signs JV agreement with RMZ Group; RMZ to acquire 50% stake in GCL for INR 1283 cr.
JV to develop 3.94M sq. ft. commercial space in Gurugram; GCL ceases as Signatureglobal subsidiary.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal signs JV agreement with RMZ Group; RMZ to acquire 50% stake in GCL for INR 1283 cr.
JV to develop 3.94M sq. ft. commercial space in Gurugram; GCL ceases as Signatureglobal subsidiary.

news.title:
Signatureglobal reported Q3 FY26 sales of INR20.1B, selling 1,700 units in 9 months.
Collections rose to INR31B, with strong cash surplus and plans to reduce net debt.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal reported Q3 FY26 sales of INR20.1B, selling 1,700 units in 9 months.
Collections rose to INR31B, with strong cash surplus and plans to reduce net debt.

news.title:
Signatureglobal expects future sales growth at 15%, down from 60% CAGR.
This revision follows a 39% rise in new housing launches in Delhi NCR, Dec Q2025.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal expects future sales growth at 15%, down from 60% CAGR.
This revision follows a 39% rise in new housing launches in Delhi NCR, Dec Q2025.

news.title:
SIGNATUREGLOBAL (INDIA) Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 FY26 earnings call.
The call discussed unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
SIGNATUREGLOBAL (INDIA) Ltd shared the audio recording of its Q3 FY26 earnings call.
The call discussed unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Signatureglobal reported revenue of INR 14.9B for 9MFY26 with collections at INR 30.9B.
Pre-sales reached INR 66.8B, with higher sales realization of INR 15,182/sq.ft, boosting margins.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal reported revenue of INR 14.9B for 9MFY26 with collections at INR 30.9B.
Pre-sales reached INR 66.8B, with higher sales realization of INR 15,182/sq.ft, boosting margins.

news.title:
Signature Global reported a Q3 net loss of ₹453M vs profit ₹291M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined sharply to ₹2.8B from ₹8.3B YoY.
news.summary:
Signature Global reported a Q3 net loss of ₹453M vs profit ₹291M YoY.
Q3 revenue declined sharply to ₹2.8B from ₹8.3B YoY.

news.title:
Signatureglobal (India) Ltd sees a sharp rise in stock volume; company attributes it to market forces.
Firm confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive information is pending; all disclosures made.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal (India) Ltd sees a sharp rise in stock volume; company attributes it to market forces.
Firm confirms no undisclosed price-sensitive information is pending; all disclosures made.

news.title:
Signatureglobal India Ltd board to meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 5th Feb 2026 per SEBI insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal India Ltd board to meet on 3rd Feb 2026 to approve Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed till 5th Feb 2026 per SEBI insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Signatureglobal shares hit a two-year low after Q3 update, falling 6.5% intraday to Rs 935.9, before recovering to Rs 956, down 4.5%.
Q3 pre-sales dropped 27% to Rs 2,020 crore; units sold fell to 408 from 1,518 YoY. Analysts maintain 'buy' with 58.9% upside target.
news.summary:
Signatureglobal shares hit a two-year low after Q3 update, falling 6.5% intraday to Rs 935.9, before recovering to Rs 956, down 4.5%.
Q3 pre-sales dropped 27% to Rs 2,020 crore; units sold fell to 408 from 1,518 YoY. Analysts maintain 'buy' with 58.9% upside target.

news.title:
SignatureGlobal lowers guidance, citing softer market environment affecting pre-sales targets.
The company stated it would not meet pre-sales expectations set months ago.
news.summary:
SignatureGlobal lowers guidance, citing softer market environment affecting pre-sales targets.
The company stated it would not meet pre-sales expectations set months ago.

news.title:
SignatureGlobal's realizations rose to ₹15,182/sq.ft, with collections hitting ₹30.9B.
Net debt stands at ₹10.2B despite a softer housing market.
news.summary:
SignatureGlobal's realizations rose to ₹15,182/sq.ft, with collections hitting ₹30.9B.
Net debt stands at ₹10.2B despite a softer housing market.

news.title:
Signature Global's Q3 sales bookings dropped 27% to ₹2,020 crore.
The decline occurred despite festive demand; last year sales were ₹2,770 crore.
news.summary:
Signature Global's Q3 sales bookings dropped 27% to ₹2,020 crore.
The decline occurred despite festive demand; last year sales were ₹2,770 crore.

news.title:
SignatureGlobal's Q3 pre-sales fell 27% YoY, remained flat QoQ at ₹20.2 billion.
Area sold dropped 42% YoY, rose 7% QoQ; collections increased 14% YoY, 32% QoQ to ₹12.3 billion.
news.summary:
SignatureGlobal's Q3 pre-sales fell 27% YoY, remained flat QoQ at ₹20.2 billion.
Area sold dropped 42% YoY, rose 7% QoQ; collections increased 14% YoY, 32% QoQ to ₹12.3 billion.
